description: Create a content slide on the Macro Foresight platform with a two-column layout: a left text block summarizing the platform screenshot and a right bullet list of capabilities and call to action.

header.headline: Macro Foresight is focused on helping companies develop strategic plans in response to the changing macro environment—reach out if you would like to learn more

left.title: Macro Foresight platform
left.body:
Forward-looking macroeconomic and geopolitical insights and trends. A blended foresight to help you anticipate change and understand how major global economic and geopolitical shifts impact your strategic planning.

Overview: We provide strategic insights and issues to C-suite executives on economic and geopolitical developments given the current external environment businesses operate in. Our goal is to translate complicated trends into simple pragmatic recommendations for our clients, supporting companies with corporate strategy, government, scenario planning and more.

Data point: 77% of CEOs expect the economy to improve in the next 12 months.

items.text: Macro Foresight helps companies develop strategic plans in response to complicated economic, financial and geopolitical shifts in the external environment
Our platform leverages Agentic AI to support:
items.sub: Trend and event monitoring; Interpretation of events and implications for strategic planning; Scenario planning activities

items.text: The team also leverages capabilities across:
items.sub: Accenture’s deep industry expertise; Corporate Strategy & Growth; Deep third-party network of policy advisors across Washington DC, London, Brussels, and Beijing

items.text: Reach out if you would like to know more about our Macro Foresight platform and subscription models
